author: juzigu40-ui
title: scan_path-driven auto-resolution launders unresolved findings into scan_verified non-failures
notes: All 7 code references verified at snapshot 6eb2065. Out-of-scope issues ARE auto-resolved with misleading scan_verified attestation, excluded from all failure modes, and hidden from summary output. However, this is intentional documented behavior with built-in safeguard: re-scanning with wider path reopens issues. The note field distinguishes out-of-scope from genuinely resolved. S088 is the earliest submission (04:52 UTC) covering this scan_path scoping concern, predating S129, S152, and S250.
